title: MAHATRANSCO Superintending Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: The Maharashtra State Electricity Transmission Company (MSETCL) has officially announced the Superintending Engineer (Civil) Recruitment 2026 with 3 openings. The detailed notification was published on the official website, mahatransco.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 50 years for Outsiders, 55 years for Reserved Category Outsiders, and 57 years for Departmental candidates and hold a Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering / Technology or its equivalent can now submit their offline applications up to 12-06-2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply offline are shared b

age_limit.age_details: Outsider: 50 years, Reserved Category Outsider: 55 years, Departmental: 57 years
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit for Outsider: 50 years Maximum Age Limit for Reserved Category Outsider: 55 years Maximum Age Limit for Departmental Candidates: 57 years

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelors Degree in Civil Engineering / Technology and its equivalent.
qualification.details: Superintending Engineer (Civil): Bachelors Degree in Civil Engineering / Technology and its equivalent. Experience: Total 12 years experience in the field of civil works related to Power Sector. Out of which at least 5 years as Executive Engineer & Additional Executive Engineer OR 2 years as Executive Engineer.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MSETCL Superintending Engineer (Civil) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.mahatransco.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MSETCL Superintending Engineer (Civil) post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Superintending Engineer (Civil) post is 12th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelors Degree in Civil Engineering / Technology or its equivalent to be eligible for the Superintending Engineer (Civil) position.

faq.question: Q3. How many years of experience are needed for the Superintending Engineer (Civil) role?
faq.answer: A total of 12 years of experience in civil works related to the Power Sector is required. This includes at least 5 years as Executive Engineer & Additional Executive Engineer or 2 years as Executive Engineer.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The age limit varies: 50 years for outsiders, 55 years for reserved category outsiders, and 57 years for departmental candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for MSETCL Superintending Engineer (Civil) recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 800 for Open Category candidates and Rs. 400 for Reserved Category candidates applying against reserved posts.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the MSETCL Superintending Engineer (Civil) post?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline by sending the duly filled application form along with required documents and demand draft to the designated address before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Superintending Engineer (Civil) position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 109935-4740-133635-5245-243780 per month.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Competency Mapping Test, which includes In-Basket Exercises, Group Discussion, Case Discussion, and Presentation Skills, followed by a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form details can be accessed through the links provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, there is age relaxation. Reserved Category Outsiders can apply up to 55 years, and Departmental candidates up to 57 years.
